name_cn:
【Paris Grey New Size】
Dior Mini Book Tote
A retro and stylish statement piece ♡ The exquisite embroidery perfectly presents it, adding a highlight to your outfit with just a casual carry~ This mini size is so adorable! The small bag shape is also very convenient for holding small items~ Whoever uses it will be stylish, a must-have for pretty girls who love high aesthetics.
Style: 1265/1286
Size: 26.5×21×14cm
Fits an iPad Air 4 or an iPad Pro 11
